title: Metabolic Signatures in a Demonstration Cohort

affiliations.text: Department of Metabolism, Example University, Shanghai, China
Example Institute of Public Health, Beijing, China

abstract: Background/Objectives: This fixture tests the Metabolites workflow. Methods: A deterministic generator test was performed. Results: The expected structural elements were produced. Conclusions: The profile can be checked automatically.

declarations.author_contributions: Conceptualization, A.C.; methodology, M.L.; writing—review and editing, A.C. and M.L.
declarations.funding: This research received no external funding.
declarations.data_availability_statement: No new data were created or analyzed in this fixture.
declarations.conflicts_of_interest: The authors declare no conflict of interest.
